questions.reference_script: Thank you for calling Sunrise Electronics, the region's leading store for home appliances, computers, and personal devices. Our showroom is open from nine in the morning until eight in the evening, Monday through Saturday, and from ten until five on Sundays. For information about repairs, warranties, delivery, or returns, please visit our website, or stay on the line and one of our friendly representatives will be happy to assist you shortly.

Good evening, and welcome to tonight's community meeting here at the Riverside Town Hall. Before we begin, I would like to remind everyone to silence their mobile phones and to sign the attendance sheet near the main entrance. This evening we have several important topics to discuss, including the new riverside park project, the schedule for the summer arts festival, and proposed changes to the weekend bus routes. Thank you all for coming.

questions.prompt: Describe the picture in as much detail as you can.
Describe the picture in as much detail as you can.

Imagine that a marketing firm is conducting a telephone survey in your area about reading habits. You have agreed to answer some questions. How often do you read books, and where do you usually like to read?
What kind of books or magazines do you enjoy the most, and how do you usually get them — do you buy them, borrow them from a library, or read them online?
Some people say that reading printed books is better than reading on a screen. Do you agree or disagree? Give reasons and examples to support your answer.
Hi, this is one of the registered attendees. I seem to have lost my copy of the program. What time does the first session begin, and who is the speaker?
questions.provided_info:
Marketing Strategy Workshop — Saturday, June 20 (Grand Conference Center)
9:00 AM   Opening Keynote: Trends in Digital Marketing (Room A, Speaker: Dr. Helen Carter)
10:30 AM  Session 1: Social Media Advertising (Room B, Speaker: Mark Lee)
12:00 PM  Lunch (Main Hall)
1:30 PM   Session 2: Email Campaigns That Convert (Room B, Speaker: Mark Lee)
3:00 PM   Panel Discussion: Measuring Return on Investment (Room A, Moderator: Susan Park)
4:30 PM   Networking Reception (Rooftop Terrace)
Registration fee: $50 (includes lunch and materials)

questions.prompt: Some companies now allow their employees to work from home instead of coming to the office every day. Do you think working from home is more beneficial than working in an office? Give specific reasons and examples to support your opinion.
